events.event: Case auto-created by the Target Visibility Gate, promoted from candidate T-AU-2026-00109 (Pearl Construction Group Pty Ltd). Promotion required at least one independently verified source_evidence entry — see dfapti/rules/factualism-audit.md.

Manual evidence sweep found two further WorkSafe Victoria releases: the original charging-stage release (October 2024) and the sentencing of co-defendant subcontractor Anthony Basa to a corrections order (August 2025).
